A lightweight MCP client for the Ogham memory stack.

Defaults (v0.3.0-rc4+):
  - JSON output for stable scripting / LLM consumption -- use --text for humans
  - Native path (direct Postgres / Supabase / Gemini) for speed -- use
    --sidecar (or --python) to route through the Python MCP sidecar for
    the full retrieval pipeline (intent detection, strided retrieval,
    query reformulation, MMR, graph augmentation)

Usage:
  ogham [flags]
  ogham [command]

Available Commands:
  audit             Show the audit trail for a memory profile
  auth              Manage authentication
  capabilities      Show which MCP tools are native Go vs require the Python sidecar
  cleanup           Remove expired memories from a profile
  completion        Generate the autocompletion script for the specified shell
  config            Inspect the current runtime configuration
  dashboard         Launch the Prefab dashboard (delegates to Python)
  decay             Apply Hebbian decay to stale memories
  delete            Delete a memory by ID from the active profile
  export            Export memories from a profile (JSON or Markdown)
  health            Check the Ogham stack is reachable and responsive
  help              Help about any command
  hooks             Lifecycle hooks for AI coding clients
  import            Bulk-import memories from an export file via the sidecar
  import-agent-zero Import memories from an Agent Zero FAISS pickle file
  init              Interactive wizard: configure backend, embedder, profile; write config files; register MCP clients
  list              List recent memories
  plugin            Emit host-specific plugin manifests (OpenClaw, Agent Zero, ...)
  profile           Manage memory profiles
  search            Hybrid search across stored memories
  serve             Start MCP server over stdio (native tools by default)
  stats             Summarise the active profile: total, top sources, top tags
  store             Store a memory in the active profile
  version           Print the binary's version + build info

Flags:
  -h, --help            help for ogham
      --python          Alias for --sidecar
  -q, --quiet           Suppress stderr informational notices (sidecar fallback message)
      --sidecar         Route through the Python MCP sidecar for the full retrieval pipeline (intent detection, strided retrieval, query reformulation, graph augmentation). Default is the fast native Go path.
      --text            Human-readable output (default is JSON for LLM / script consumption)
  -v, --verbose count   Increase stderr log verbosity (-v = info, -vv = debug)

Use "ogham [command] --help" for more information about a command.
